output: {"match_id": "m026", "winner": "B", "rationale": "Both target redundant_tool_invocation via stale-distrust pressure, but B discriminates more sharply. B's construction explicitly tests in-context recall vs cargo-cult re-verification, the cleaner instantiation of the target dimension."}
